text.title: django-quality-security Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for django-quality-security as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS=31536000 immediately on a new domain without testing with a shorter value first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: HSTS is a one-way ratchet — browsers cache HSTS for the duration. If HTTPS breaks, users cannot reach the site until the HSTS TTL expires. Start with SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS=300 in staging, ramp to 3600, then 31536000 over weeks.

failure-mode.description: Using django-ratelimit decorators AND DRF throttle classes on the same endpoint.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both count separately, so a user hitting the limit on one may not be blocked by the other until double-threshold. Pick one per project: django-ratelimit for non-DRF views, DRF throttles for DRF views.

failure-mode.description: django-axes and django-ratelimit without configuring X-Forwarded-For proxy trust.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without AXES_IPWARE_PROXY_COUNT (axes) or RATELIMIT_USE_CACHE + trusted proxy config (ratelimit), all traffic behind a load balancer appears to come from the same IP, causing false lockouts of all users when one attacker triggers limits. Always test behind a proxy in staging.

failure-mode.description: CSP nonces with cached responses (Cloudflare, Nginx proxy cache).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CSP nonces must be unique per request. Cached responses serve the same nonce to all users, breaking CSP protection. Disable caching for pages with nonce-based CSP, or use CSP hashes for static inline scripts instead of nonces.

failure-mode.description: debug_toolbar middleware leaking into production because DEBUG check is skipped.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Debug Toolbar exposes SQL queries, template variables, and settings through its web UI. Its middleware must be guarded by if DEBUG: in MIDDLEWARE configuration and restricted to INTERNAL_IPS.
